company.name: Atlas Path Travel
company.tagline: Trusted guide-led journeys for modern travelers.
company.intro: Atlas Path Travel is a premium online tourism guide service blending beautifully planned itineraries with the reassurance of vetted local experts, secure booking, and calm guest care from the first enquiry to the final transfer.
company.mission: To make ambitious travel feel personal, dependable, and deeply local.
company.vision: To be the most trusted digital guide service for curated small-group and private journeys worldwide.

serviceHighlights.title: Concierge itinerary design
serviceHighlights.description: Every itinerary is refined around seasonality, pacing, and meaningful local access.

serviceHighlights.title: Verified local experts
serviceHighlights.description: We work only with hand-selected guides known for language skills, safety standards, and regional knowledge.

serviceHighlights.title: Secure booking confidence
serviceHighlights.description: Deposits, full balances, invoices, and booking records are tracked in one trusted flow.

serviceHighlights.title: Guest-first support
serviceHighlights.description: Travelers receive pre-departure guidance, WhatsApp support, and rapid response if plans need to change.

reasons.title: Well-known for reliability
reasons.description: Repeat guests, corporate travel planners, and families use Atlas Path for dependable execution.

reasons.title: Small groups by design
reasons.description: We keep groups intimate so guides can move at a thoughtful pace and personalize the journey.

reasons.title: Transparent inclusions
reasons.description: Each package clearly explains what is included, excluded, and payable later.

reasons.title: Responsible travel partners
reasons.description: Accommodation, transport, and community partners are selected for quality and sustainability.

policies.cancellation: Bookings may be cancelled online up to 14 days before departure. Paid balances inside the window require manual review.
policies.modification: Guests can request a date or guest-count change until the modification deadline shown in the dashboard.
policies.payments: A 30% deposit secures space on most departures. Balance can be paid later or settled in full at booking.

destinations.name: Swiss Alps
destinations.teaser: High-altitude rail journeys, glacier viewpoints, and polished mountain hospitality.

destinations.name: Kyoto & Nara
destinations.teaser: Temple districts, tea culture, seasonal gardens, and deeply knowledgeable hosts.

destinations.name: Marrakech & Sahara
destinations.teaser: Souks, kasbahs, and desert nights with comfort-focused logistics.

destinations.name: Norwegian Fjords
destinations.teaser: Scenic cruising, design-forward stays, and measured outdoor adventure.

offers.title: Spring Signature Departures
offers.description: Save 10% on selected April and May journeys with code SPRING10.

offers.title: Private Family Upgrade
offers.description: Upgrade select departures to a private family format with concierge planning support.

offers.title: Insider Dispatch
offers.description: Join our newsletter for early-release itineraries, destination notes, and private departure windows.

trustBadges.title: Verified local guides
trustBadges.description: Background-checked guide partners with destination-specific expertise.

trustBadges.title: Secure checkout
trustBadges.description: Protected payment flow with clear invoice records and traceable statuses.

trustBadges.title: 24/7 guest care
trustBadges.description: Rapid support before departure and while travelers are in destination.

trustBadges.title: Responsible partners
trustBadges.description: Preferred suppliers selected for safety, quality, and sustainability practices.

faqs.question: Can I reserve a place with a deposit?
faqs.answer: Yes. Most departures can be secured with a 30% deposit. You can also pay in full if you prefer.

faqs.question: How do online modifications work?
faqs.answer: Eligible bookings show modification controls in the customer dashboard. If a trip is inside the policy window, our team reviews the request manually.

faqs.question: Do your guides speak multiple languages?
faqs.answer: Yes. Each guide profile lists spoken languages and specialties so guests can choose the best fit.

faqs.question: Are airport transfers included?
faqs.answer: Included services vary by package. Every tour detail page clearly lists inclusions and exclusions.

faqs.question: Can I use promo codes with a deposit?
faqs.answer: Yes, when a promo is valid for the selected departure and category, the discount is applied to the payment being processed.

faqs.question: Is WhatsApp support available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Guests can contact our guest care desk on WhatsApp for pre-departure and in-destination support.

guides.name: Elena Rousseau
guides.bio: Elena blends mountain logistics, cultural storytelling, and polished hospitality across Switzerland, northern Italy, and the wider Alps.

guides.name: Kenji Nakamura
guides.bio: Kenji designs calm, deeply informed journeys through Kyoto, Nara, and Osaka with a focus on craft, ritual, and neighborhood detail.

guides.name: Amine El Idrissi
guides.bio: Amine is known for meticulous route timing, warm guest care, and immersive storytelling from Marrakech to the Sahara.

guides.name: Ingrid Solberg
guides.bio: Ingrid leads fjord-focused itineraries with a careful balance of outdoor activity, Scandinavian design stays, and regional food culture.

guides.name: Mateo Silva
guides.bio: Mateo specializes in high-service adventure departures across Patagonia, helping guests tackle big landscapes with confidence and rhythm.

guides.name: Lucia Bianchi
guides.bio: Lucia combines art history, food storytelling, and effortless route planning for guests exploring the Adriatic and Italian coasts.

tours.title: Alpine Grand Circuit
tours.overview: A polished small-group alpine route with panoramic rail journeys, glacier viewpoints, village stays, and wellness-friendly pacing.
highlights: Panoramic rail segments and mountain villages
Small-group pacing with guide-managed logistics
Curated hotel stays and regional tasting menus
Glacier viewpoints, lakefront time, and wellness moments

reviews.body: Atlas Path delivered the rare combination of polish and warmth. Every transfer worked, every hotel felt right, and Elena read the room beautifully.
Kenji turned Kyoto into a lived experience instead of a checklist. The pacing was wonderful and the communication before arrival was first-class.
The desert camp was beautiful, but what really stood out was how calm and organized the whole route felt. We never had to guess what came next.
Ingrid balanced scenery, comfort, and just enough activity for our family. It felt premium without ever feeling stiff.
A serious landscape handled with serious professionalism. Mateo gave us confidence every day and the lodge choices were excellent.
Lucia made the route feel intimate and elegant. We loved the food stops, the old towns, and how easy it all felt from booking to departure.

traveler.specialRequests: Quiet room preference and one vegetarian dinner option.
